title: Tomato Transformation Media
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9uare","text":"This protocol is simply the media recipes for use with my tomato transformation protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"4i158","text":"It helps to make up stock solutions of the vitamins, hormones, and antibiotics ahead of time and freeze them. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"32m5a","text":"Since the concentration of phytohormones and vitamins can vary across medias, we make them both up to a standard concentration of 1mg/mL for easy math.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7g3pm","text":"Antibiotics are typically used at a single concentration in all of our medias, so they are made up as a 1000x stock. That is, their actual concentration varies depending on the antibiotic, but in every case you will add 1µL of stock for every 1mL of media.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: To make 1L, for each media, dissolve the following components to ~800mL of MilliQ water in a 1L beaker %s %s
Bring volume to 1L and adjust pH (±0.03) according to the table below: %s %s

Divide the volume into two screw-top jars and add the following gelling agent. Note that not all medias require a gelling agent, and that this mass is the TOTAL mass added for 1L. It is not necessary to dissolve this powder; it will dissolve in the autoclave. %s %s
Autoclave the media, and allow to cool to ~50º. Add any antibiotics and phytohormones (filter-sterile) according to the table below: %s %s
In the sterile hood, dispense the media into the following containers. The liquid media can simply be stored in the screw-top jar. %s %s
Once the media has solidified, return the plates to their sleeves, label them accordingly, and store a 4ºC for up to several months.
creator: Alex Rajewski
